contexts.context: ...dreams engross, With their own visions oft astonish'd <mark>droop</mark>;  When o'er the wat'ry strath or quaggy moss...
...The apparition of the pale and bloated corpse "with <mark>drooping</mark> willows drest,"69 standing before his wife,...
...with, not his pecuniary misfortunes alone, but the <mark>drooping</mark> health of his wife, and the consolation afforded...
..., though animated life is seen no more, the <mark>drooping</mark> birch and feathery larch protrude their storm-beaten...
